'''Haryette Davani''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of [[Nils Davani|Nils]] and the [[Parent/Legends|mother]] of [[Myrette Davani|Myrette]]. She lived on [[Beheboth]] and thought that [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] was "a snob." She cooked [[harza cake]].
